rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms the year is 1837. `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified the year, while `gemini-flash` incorrectly read it as 1834.

rows.description: To Mr Pickersgill for his portrait of Mr Justice Coleridge ---- 105.0.0
rows.notes: Visual inspection shows this entire description on one physical line. This is the first part of a braced entry, with the sub-amount '105.0.0' embedded in the description rather than in the main ledger amount columns. Neither extractor correctly captured this as a single line: `gemini-flash` split the description into two (its R6 and R7) and `gpt-5-mini` also split it and incorrectly interpreted '105.0.0' as a main ledger amount (its R7). Selected combined, accurate description.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Pickersgill for a portrait of Mr Justice Coleridge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Pickersgill for a portrait of Mr Justice Coleridge, amounting to £105 0s 0d (as stated in the entry).

rows.description: Frame for Do. ---- 8.8.0
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms this description is on the second physical line of the braced entry, with an embedded sub-amount '8.8.0'. The total amount '113 8 0' for the entire braced group (R6 and R7) is clearly aligned with the brace next to this line. `gemini-flash` (its R8) correctly captured the final amount and description for this line, albeit in its shifted row structure. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly interpreted '8.8.0' as a main ledger amount (its R8) and created an extra 'total' row (its R9) for the correct sum.
rows.english_description: Payment for the frame for the portrait of Mr Justice Coleridge.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the frame for the portrait of Mr Justice Coleridge, amounting to £113 8s 0d.
